title: phlomis umbrosa var. stenocalyx
intro: Phlomis umbrosa var. stenocalyx, a variant of the Phlomis umbrosa plant, is a type of flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of Phlomis umbrosa var. stenocalyx include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Phlomis umbrosa var. stenocalyx can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption for its medicinal benefits.
